name: Chex (JAX Testing and Utilities)

agent_readiness.notes: JAX testing utilities from DeepMind. import chex. chex.assert_shape(x, (batch, seq, dim)). chex.assert_type(x, jnp.float32). chex.assert_trees_all_close(output, expected). @chex.variants decorator: test under jit, vmap, jit+vmap variants automatically. chex.dataclass for frozen dataclasses compatible with JAX pytrees. chex.assert_max_traces() to verify JIT compilation count. Essential for testing JAX code correctly across function transformations.

gotchas: JAX-only — no value for non-JAX projects
requires understanding of JAX transformations to use @chex.variants effectively
best_when: Testing JAX functions under jit, vmap, and grad transforms
Shape and dtype assertions in JAX research code
Verifying JIT trace counts (catching unexpected retracing)
Testing Haiku or Flax model outputs
summary: Chex provides JAX testing utilities from DeepMind. chex.assert_shape(), chex.assert_type(), chex.assert_trees_all_close() for JAX array assertions. @chex.variants automatically tests functions under jit, vmap, and combined variants. chex.assert_max_traces() catches unexpected JIT retracing. Essential for correctly testing JAX research code across functional transformations.
